summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The iShares Russell 1000 Value ETF (IWD) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Russell 1000 Value index. The fund tracks an index of US large- and mid-cap value stocks. The index selects from US stocks ranked 1-1,000 by market cap. IWD was launched on May 22, 2000 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.text: While the Federal Reserve left interest rates unchanged at the latest meeting, investors increasingly speculate that rate hikes are on the table in 2026.

holdings.infoBox: IWD is an equity ETF with a total of 874 individual holdings. The top holdings are Amazon.com stock at 5.98%, Apple at 5.94%, Microsoft at 3.99%, JPMorgan Chase & Co. at 2.56%, and Berkshire Hathaway at 2.51%.
